title: Shin Eva Official Social Media 222 You Can Not Release
display_title: Shin Eva Official Social Media 222 You Can Not Release
wikitext:
[]: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by Joseki » Sat Nov 14, 2020 3:03 pm 2017 Recap SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by Stan » Sat Nov 14, 2020 4:19 pm Already in the second thread, eh? I wonder if promotion will ramp up and we'll be in a 'shin eva social media 3.33' thread before Final releases!

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by Tajai » Sat Nov 14, 2020 5:24 pm Stan wrote: Already in the second thread, eh? I wonder if promotion will ramp up and we'll be in a 'shin eva social media 3.33' thread before Final releases!

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by Joseki » Sat Nov 14, 2020 7:04 pm Is there any way to put the OP entirely under spoiler tag? This first page is lagging hard lol

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Nov 14, 2020 9:49 pm Very nice work with that compilation, Joseki.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by Kendrix » Sun Nov 15, 2020 6:10 am I didn't see the lenght part yet! Since it is the frachise finale I do sure hope that is maybe 5 hours long if 6 is out of the question

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by Joseki » Sun Nov 15, 2020 10:28 am I put the first post under spoiler tag so that the page is at least somewhat readable. The thread is still massive so we are thinking about other solutions.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Nov 16, 2020 7:09 am Honestly that stuff you've collected might deserve its own page/website if someone has the time for that.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by GhostlyOcam » Thu Nov 19, 2020 4:43 am The dialogue recording for Shin Evangelion is completely finished! Ogata said that she's about to cry and has a headache, apparently from screaming too much. Both she and Anno were holding the D-part script, by the way. Ogata's Tweet: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by Kendrix » Thu Nov 19, 2020 5:03 am GhostlyOcam wrote: The dialogue recording for Shin Evangelion is completely finished! Ogata said that she's about to cry and has a headache, apparently from screaming too much.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by xolbor » Thu Nov 19, 2020 5:57 am GhostlyOcam wrote: The dialogue recording for Shin Evangelion is completely finished! Ogata said that she's about to cry and has a headache, apparently from screaming too much. Both she and Anno were holding the D-part script, by the way. Ogata's Tweet: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by GhostlyOcam » Thu Nov 19, 2020 6:01 am Khara nigouki said that the film is not finished yet and they want to make use all the time they have before release. It's still mid-November, so using every second at their disposal to deliver the best work possible is seemingly their philosophy, at this point I'm not sure if there'll be much noticeable technical improvements for the 3.33+1.11 version unless they're reinserting the possible cut scenes (I still sincerely hope the theatrical release will be the complete version Anno intended, not the cinemas-manted one) SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by Mr. M » Thu Nov 19, 2020 6:11 am Which part is on the script? Based on that, we could imagine when Shinji's gonna scream.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by Joseki » Thu Nov 19, 2020 6:13 am Not that it's unexpected, but Ogata and Anno are holding the D-part script, meaning they recorded the ending today, and so Shinji's screams that gave Ogata an headache are from the ending. I guess the ending is more 2.22-like and less 1.11/3.33-like. Also the script is dated October 15th.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by GhostlyOcam » Thu Nov 19, 2020 6:22 am Well, it's only Ogata's part and the D-part is 41 minutes long, a lot could happen between the climax and the ending, not to mention the inevitable multiple retakes even for a single scream because Anno . I'm probably one of the few who's hoping that it'll be something calmer and more contemplative (e.g. Until You Come to Me's ending), but we'll see. EDIT: Khara's tweet does mention retakes, so I can imagine Ogata redoing a lot of screams for earlier scenes until Anno gets what he wants, hence the headache and most likely sore throat.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by hui43210 » Thu Nov 19, 2020 9:47 am Shouldn't really be that shocking that this film is probably closer to 2.0 than 3.0, everything we've seen has indicated that there will be heavy amounts of action. I don't think the plan was ever to repeat EOE and have the movie be an artful mindfuck if you will. Slightly related, this is why I always thought it was weird people were so quick to crap on 3.0. "It's too depressing! It doesn't explain anything!" It's as if people failed to account that's it's only the quarter of the story, and there's still a quarter left.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Nov 19, 2020 10:28 am Guys, I'm pretty sure the film will be anything but what any of us expect lol.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by Mr. M » Thu Nov 19, 2020 10:30 am hui43210 wrote: Shouldn't really be that shocking that this film is probably closer to 2.0 than 3.0.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by GhostlyOcam » Thu Nov 19, 2020 10:32 am hui43210 wrote: I don't think the plan was ever to repeat EOE and have the movie be an artful mindfuck if you will.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release Post by GhostlyOcam » Thu Nov 19, 2020 10:52 pm Not quite a news but Ogata's latest tweet might provides a small bit of context about the screams since it mentions something about a battle scene from yesterday's recording. Are we gonna see Shinji going full God Mode in Unit-01 again?! SPOILER: Show
